evidence.summary: CTR gap 247.9 clicks: pos 3.46, CTR 0.26% vs expected 11%. GA4: 42 sess, 28 conv, 62% eng.

recommendation.summary: Minor title/meta polish; focus on structured data/review richness. Proposed title keeps product name, adds peptides/benefits in meta.

evidence.summary: CTR gap 100.8 clicks: pos 5.22, CTR 0.27% vs expected 7%. GA4: 87 sess, 99 conv, 95% eng. Top query 'centella serum' not in title.

recommendation.summary: Title rewrite: add 'Ampoule Serum' to match queries. Drop 'Madagascar'/'Tone' to reduce truncation.

evidence.summary: CTR gap 37.4 clicks: pos 3.76, CTR 0.18% vs expected 7%. GA4: 9 sess, 100% eng. Pos 1.0 for brand query with 0% CTR.

recommendation.summary: Minor title/meta polish. Target dark spots/brightening in meta. Reduce truncation.

evidence.summary: CTR gap 29.3 clicks but 234 GA4 sessions from non-search channels. Low GSC impression volume.

recommendation.summary: No title change. Improve position via internal links from journal/concern pages.

notes: SEO-GAP-1 rank 4. Authority gap, not title.

evidence.summary: CTR gap 15.9 clicks. Pos 7.6, 55% bounce. Title matches queries well. Content depth gap.

recommendation.summary: No title change. Route to SEO-4 (buying guide depth) and SEO-5 (internal links).

notes: SEO-GAP-1 rank 6. Also flagged in SEO-GAP-3 usefulness triage.

evidence.summary: GA4: 22 sess, 55% bounce, WPM 1074. Users not consuming guide content.

recommendation.summary: Content depth improvement via SEO-4 buying guide scope.

evidence.summary: GA4: 34 sess, 88% bounce, 785KB page. Users finding nothing useful.

recommendation.summary: Known backlog item: lazy-load logos or paginate. Deferred post-freeze.

notes: SEO-GAP-3 category A. Brands page weight is a known backlog item.

evidence.summary: GA4: 33 sess, 67% bounce, WPM 2676. High bounce on category page.

recommendation.summary: Category content audit (routes to SEO-3 coverage audit).
